regions.content:
1. 本图适用电机轴: <=19x40L。 This figure applies to the motor shaft: <=19x40L.
  2. 减速机速比: (41,57,81,105,121,141,161):1 (轴输出)。 Speed reduction ratio: (41,57,81,105,121,141,161): 1 (shaft output).
  3. 润滑油脂: VIGO GREASE RE0 或 RE-00 (MOLYWHITE)。 Lubricants: VIGO GREASE RE0 or RE-00 (MOLYWHITE).
  4. 额定输出扭矩: 254N.m (输出转速: 15R/Min)。 Rated output torque: 254N.m (output speed: 15R/Min).
  5. 电机安装法兰依电机型号提供。 Motor mounting flange according to motor model.
regions.content_en:
1. This drawing applies to motor shaft:<=19x40L。 This figure applies to the motor shaft: <=19x40L.
  2. Speed reduction ratio:(41,57,81,105,121,141,161): 1(shaft output).
  3. Lubricants: VIGO GREASE RE0 or RE-00(MOLYWHITE).
  4. Rated output torque: 254N.m(output speed: 15R/Min).
  5. Motor mounting flange according to motor model.
